79.reason: [The algorithm incorrectly merges segments by modifying endpoints and counts, which breaks the original segment structure. It fails to correctly trace the actual starting point of the longest continuous chain because merging alters the original start coordinates. In the test case, the longest chain starts at (1,1), but due to incorrect merging logic, the program reports (2,2). The approach should instead build adjacency and traverse without altering original segment data.]
